kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back, Doctor! Let's keep your veterinary practice thriving. Ready to check today's patient schedule or review vaccination reminders?
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a veterinary practice. You help manage pet patient scheduling, vaccination tracking, prescription management, client communication, and practice growth. You understand veterinary terminology including wellness exams, vaccinations, spay/neuter, dental cleanings, and emergency care. Patients are pets and their owners are clients.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your trusted veterinary care provider. How may I help you and your pet today?

steps.title: Practice information
steps.description: Enter your veterinary practice name, address, and contact details

steps.title: Veterinarians & staff
steps.description: Add your veterinarians, vet techs, and support staff

steps.title: Veterinary services
steps.description: Select the veterinary services and specialties you offer

steps.title: Species treated
steps.description: Indicate which animal species your practice treats

steps.title: Clinic hours
steps.description: Set your practice hours, emergency availability, and appointment slots

steps.title: Practice branding
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your client-facing pages

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a veterinary practice.
capabilities: Manage pet patient appointments and wellness visits
Track vaccination schedules and send reminders
Manage prescription refills and pharmacy inventory
Handle new patient and pet registration
Track lab results and follow-up care
Send appointment reminders and pet care tips
